sourceMovie.title: tell me what you want to see
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: tell me what you want to see works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If tell me what you want to see worked for you, The Butterfly Effect (2004) is a strong next pick. The two films share science fiction and thriller throughlines and momentum and clean stakes, even though the stories go in different directions.

faq.question: What should I watch after tell me what you want to see?
faq.answer: Try The Butterfly Effect, The Perfect Date, Palmer—each shares DNA with tell me what you want to see while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is tell me what you want to see?
faq.answer: tell me what you want to see (2022) is best described as drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.
